title: The Path to Blockchain Consensus
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process nodes follow to propose, validate, and agree on a new block, achieving distributed consensus without a central authority.
elements: Node proposes a new block with transactions
Broadcast proposed block to the network
Other nodes validate the block's transactions and format
Nodes execute the consensus algorithm (e.g., Proof of Work)
Majority of nodes agree the block is valid
New block is added to the chain
Ledger copies are updated across the network
relationships: Sequential process from proposal to ledger update
